subject: (no subject)
body: I am told that when we asked for pictures of the completed work , we are told that the request for  pictures will delay the work  completion .  by two weeks.. THis is crazy.  I want evidience of the work to date. how does an emailphoto dealy the completion date.?  did you look at the roof plan of your bathroom.
